content: R3F/Three.js graph rendering: each mesh is a draw call (keep well under ~1000, ideally low hundreds); use instancing to batch thousands of nodes/edges into a single draw call; default R3F re-renders every frame even when idle (use frameloop="demand" or gate with useFrame conditionals); frame budget is ~16-20ms, blowing it on either React or Three.js side causes jank; dedicated force-graph libs (r3f-forcegraph) offload D3/ngraph simulation.
